hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ -n "$FILE_PATH" && "$FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then python3 -m py_compile "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || { echo "py_compile failed on $FILE_PATH — fix the syntax error before continuing" >&2; exit 1; }; fi

cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" && unstaged=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^AGENTS.md$' | head -5); untracked=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^AGENTS.md$' | head -5); unpushed=$(git log --oneline '@{u}..HEAD' 2>/dev/null | head -3); if [[ -n "$unstaged" || -n "$untracked" || -n "$unpushed" ]]; then echo '── session-end check ──' >&2; [[ -n "$unstaged" ]] && echo "uncommitted changes:" >&2 && echo "$unstaged" | sed 's/^/  /' >&2; [[ -n "$untracked" ]] && echo "untracked files:" >&2 && echo "$untracked" | sed 's/^/  /' >&2; [[ -n "$unpushed" ]] && echo "unpushed commits:" >&2 && echo "$unpushed" | sed 's/^/  /' >&2; fi; exit 0
